title.en: IEC 62304 Edition 2 -- Major Overhaul of Medical Device Software Standard (Aug 2026)
title.zh: IEC 62304 第2版 -- 医疗器械软件标准20年来最大修订（2026年8月发布）

summary.en: Scheduled for publication 12 August 2026. Key changes: scope expanded from 'medical device software' to 'health software' (including wellness apps, remote monitoring); three safety classes replaced by two Software Process Rigor Levels (I and II); new AI/ML development lifecycle clause (5.1.15); cybersecurity integrated as core design control (referencing IEC 81001-5-1); ISO 13485 and ISO 14971 removed as normative references; legacy software moved to informative annex; new Agile guidance in Annex F. Full regulatory adoption expected 2028-2029.
summary.zh: 预定2026年8月12日发布。核心变化：适用范围从"医疗器械软件"扩展至"健康软件"（含健康管理应用、远程监控）；三级安全分类替换为两级软件过程严格度级别（I级和II级）；新增 AI/ML 开发生命周期条款（5.1.15）；网络安全作为核心设计控制集成（引用 IEC 81001-5-1）；ISO 13485 和 ISO 14971 移除规范性引用；遗留软件移至资料性附录；新增敏捷开发指南附录 F。预计2028-2029年完成监管采纳。
